$schema_note: Shared category->label fixture for ADR-0003 token grammar. Source of truth mirrors ogentic-shield src/ogentic_shield/redaction.py CATEGORY_LABEL_TO_ENTITY_TYPES. A conformance test MUST assert this table equals Shield's; drift here silently re-creates cross-package token divergence (OGE-1684).
fallback_rule: For any Shield entity_type not listed below, label = entity_type.title().replace('_', '') — e.g. COUNSEL_COMMUNICATION -> CounselCommunication. The mapping is many-to-one: multiple entity types share one coarser label (e.g. EXECUTIVE_NAME -> Person), which reduces category leakage. The vault always stores the exact category; only the token shows the label.
